data.title: AFIC Reports Strong Portfolio Performance Amid Market Fluctuations
data.description:
Don’t Miss TipRanks’ Half-Year Sale

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

Australian Foundation Investment Co. Ltd. ( (AU:AFI) ) has issued an update.

AFIC reported its monthly net tangible asset (NTA) backing per share as of June 30, 2025, highlighting a diversified investment strategy with a focus on long-term growth. The company’s portfolio performance aligns with the S&P/ASX 200 Accumulation Index, which saw a 13.8% gain for the financial year, despite sectoral fluctuations. The Energy sector experienced a notable increase in June, while the Materials and Consumer Staples sectors faced declines. AFIC’s top investments include major Australian companies like Commonwealth Bank of Australia and BHP, with banks making up a significant portion of the portfolio. The announcement underscores AFIC’s commitment to providing tax-effective income and consistent returns to its shareholders.

More about Australian Foundation Investment Co. Ltd.

Australian Foundation Investment Company Limited (AFIC) is a long-term investor focusing on a diversified portfolio primarily of ASX-listed Australian equities. The company aims to provide shareholders with attractive investment returns through fully franked dividends and capital enhancement over the medium to long term. AFIC is listed on both the ASX and NZX under the code AFI, and it manages a portfolio valued at $10.5 billion as of June 30, 2025.

Average Trading Volume: 536,884

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

For detailed information about AFI stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: DMG Blockchain Solutions Faces Operational Challenges but Advances Strategic Energy Transition
data.description:
Don’t Miss TipRanks’ Half-Year Sale

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

DMG Blockchain Solutions ( (TSE:DMGI) ) has issued an announcement.

DMG Blockchain Solutions reported a decrease in its June 2025 operational results due to an unscheduled electrical outage and issues with its hydro infrastructure, leading to a reduced hashrate and fewer bitcoins mined compared to May. Despite these challenges, DMG is advancing its strategy to transition to low-cost renewable energy sources, planning a new data processing center outside British Columbia and aiming to expand its Bitcoin mining capacity. The company also granted stock options and RSUs to align employee incentives with its growth objectives.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:DMGI) stock is a Buy with a C$0.85 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on DMG Blockchain Solutions stock, see the TSE:DMGI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:DMGI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:DMGI is a Neutral.

DMG Blockchain Solutions has a low overall stock score driven primarily by weak financial performance and negative valuation metrics. Technical indicators also show bearish trends. However, strategic initiatives in AI and software may provide future growth opportunities, as discussed in the earnings call.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:DMGI stock, click here.

More about DMG Blockchain Solutions

DMG Blockchain Solutions Inc. is a publicly traded, vertically integrated blockchain and data center technology company that develops end-to-end digital solutions to monetize digital assets and artificial intelligence compute ecosystems. It operates within a carbon-neutral Bitcoin ecosystem, facilitating sustainable and regulatory-compliant Bitcoin transactions.

data.title: Franklin Covey Reports Q3 FY2025 Financial Results
data.description:
Franklin Covey ( (FC) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Franklin Covey presented to its investors.

Don’t Miss TipRanks’ Half-Year Sale

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

Franklin Covey Co. is a leading organizational performance improvement company that provides content, training, and tools to drive systemic changes in human behavior across various sectors, including enterprise and education. In its third quarter fiscal 2025 earnings report, Franklin Covey announced consolidated revenue of $67.1 million, which fell within the company’s guidance range. Despite facing a net loss of $1.4 million due to restructuring costs, the company exceeded its guidance for Adjusted EBITDA, achieving $7.3 million. The company also reported strong liquidity with over $95 million available, including $33.7 million in cash.

Franklin Covey’s financial performance in Q3 FY2025 was impacted by macroeconomic uncertainties and geopolitical trade tensions, leading to a decrease in revenue across its Enterprise and Education divisions compared to the previous year. The Enterprise Division saw a decline in North America and International Direct Office revenues, while the Education Division experienced reduced materials revenue. However, the company noted an increase in training, coaching, and subscription revenues, with deferred subscription revenue rising by 7% year-over-year.

The company’s strategic initiatives, including a sales transformation in its Enterprise North America business, have begun to show positive results, with an increase in new clients and strong client retention. Multi-year subscription contracts have also grown, indicating a stable future revenue stream. Despite the challenges, Franklin Covey remains optimistic about its growth prospects, expecting to accelerate revenue growth and achieve significant increases in Adjusted EBITDA and free cash flow in fiscal 2026.

Looking ahead, Franklin Covey has updated its fiscal 2025 guidance, projecting total revenue between $265 million and $275 million and Adjusted EBITDA between $28 million and $33 million. The company is committed to creating long-term value for shareholders and customers by focusing on strategic initiatives and managing through current macroeconomic headwinds.

data.title: 3D Energi Confirms Otway Project Drilling Plans for 2025
data.description:
Don’t Miss TipRanks’ Half-Year Sale

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

The latest announcement is out from 3D Oil Limited ( (AU:TDO) ).

3D Energi Limited has confirmed the final well locations and drilling schedule for Phase 1 of the Otway Exploration Drilling Program. The company, alongside operator ConocoPhillips Australia, plans to commence drilling in September 2025, with two exploration wells, Essington-1 and Charlemont-1, being the initial targets. This phase is part of a larger program proposing up to six exploration wells, with 3D Energi being carried by ConocoPhillips for up to $65 million in drilling costs. The announcement marks a significant step in the company’s exploration efforts, potentially impacting its market position and stakeholder interests.

More about 3D Oil Limited

3D Energi Limited is a company involved in the energy sector, focusing on exploration and development projects. It holds a 20% interest in the VIC/P79 and T/49P exploration permits in the Otway Basin.

Average Trading Volume: 156,756

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

The latest update is out from Magnum Mining and Exploration Limited ( (AU:MGU) ).

Magnum Mining & Exploration Limited has announced a change in the director’s interest in securities, specifically involving Luke Martino.
